name: Multilingual Localization Diagnostics
description: Diagnostic test to understand what loaded and troubleshoot issues

steps.name: Print all available languages
steps.code: var langs = Menace.SDK.MultiLingualLocalization.GetAvailableLanguages(); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Available languages ({langs.Length}): {string.Join(", ", langs)}"); langs.Length > 0

steps.name: Print English categories
steps.code: var cats = Menace.SDK.MultiLingualLocalization.GetCategories("English"); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"English categories ({cats.Length}): {string.Join(", ", cats.Take(10))}"); cats.Length > 0

steps.name: Print weapon keys (first 10)
steps.code: var keys = Menace.SDK.MultiLingualLocalization.GetKeys("English", "weapons").Take(10); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Weapon keys: {string.Join(", ", keys)}"); keys.Count() > 0

steps.name: Sample translation for first weapon key
steps.code: var key = Menace.SDK.MultiLingualLocalization.GetKeys("English", "weapons").FirstOrDefault(); var text = Menace.SDK.MultiLingualLocalization.GetTranslation("English", "weapons", key); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Key: {key} => Text: {text}"); !string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)

steps.name: Check all translations for first weapon key
steps.code: var key = Menace.SDK.MultiLingualLocalization.GetKeys("English", "weapons").FirstOrDefault(); var all = Menace.SDK.MultiLingualLocalization.GetAllTranslations("weapons", key); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Translations for {key}:"); foreach (var kvp in all) { UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"  {kvp.Key}: {kvp.Value}"); } all.Count > 0

steps.name: Check if CSV files are being read
steps.code: var dataPath = UnityEngine.Application.dataPath; var parentDir = System.IO.Directory.GetParent(dataPath)?.FullName; var locPath = System.IO.Path.Combine(parentDir, "Localization"); var exists = System.IO.Directory.Exists(locPath); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Localization folder exists at {locPath}: {exists}"); if (exists) { var files = System.IO.Directory.GetFiles(locPath, "*.csv"); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"CSV files found: {files.Length}"); foreach (var f in files) UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"  - {System.IO.Path.GetFileName(f)}"); } true

steps.name: Check Resources for embedded CSV
steps.code: var englishResource = UnityEngine.Resources.Load<UnityEngine.TextAsset>("English"); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"English TextAsset from Resources: {(englishResource != null ? "Found" : "Not Found")}"); if (englishResource != null) { UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"English CSV size: {englishResource.text.Length} characters"); UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"First 200 chars: {englishResource.text.Substring(0, System.Math.Min(200, englishResource.text.Length))}"); } true

steps.name: Test CSV parsing on sample data
steps.code: var testCsv = "Key,Type,Default,Translation\nweapons.test.name,Text,Test Weapon,Test Weapon\n"; UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Testing CSV parsing with: {testCsv}"); true

steps.name: Verify language constants match actual enum
steps.code: var constants = Menace.SDK.MultiLingualLocalization.Languages.All; UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Language constants defined: {string.Join(", ", constants)}"); constants.Length > 0
